simple_types.name: Audio_Frequency
simple_types.code:
type Audio_Frequency is
  (Audio_Freq_8kHz,
   Audio_Freq_11kHz,
   Audio_Freq_16kHz,
   Audio_Freq_22kHz,
   Audio_Freq_32kHz,
   Audio_Freq_44kHz,
   Audio_Freq_48kHz,
   Audio_Freq_96kHz)
  with Size => 32;

simple_types.name: Audio_Volume
simple_types.code: type Audio_Volume is new Natural range 0 .. 100;

array_types.name: Audio_Buffer
array_types.code:
type Audio_Buffer is array (Natural range <>) of Integer_16
  with Component_Size => 16, Alignment => 2;

subprograms.name: Receive
subprograms.code:
procedure Receive (This : in out Audio_Stream;
                   Data : out Audio_Buffer)

subprograms.name: Set_Frequency
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Frequency (This      : in out Audio_Stream;
                         Frequency : Audio_Frequency)

subprograms.name: Transmit
subprograms.code:
procedure Transmit (This : in out Audio_Stream;
                    Data : Audio_Buffer)
